Attachment.msbt._Adjective: The prefix of the fused name of this and some other actor.
Attachment.msbt._Name: The normal name of the actor.

AutoBuilderDraft.msbt._Name: The name of the autobuild schematic.

CharaDirectory.msbt._Alias: The NPC's meaning to you, the player (eg: 'Source of the Right Arm', or 'The Princess of Hyrule'.)
CharaDirectory.msbt._InstantTips: The text that appears when the NPC's profile is added to the player's compendium.

Horse.msbt._Name: The name of the horse accessory (eg: a mane, or a bridle).

LinkHouse.msbt._Caption: The description of the room piece.
LinkHouse.msbt._Name: The name of the room piece.

PictureBook.msbt._Caption: The caption of the picture book entry.
PictureBook.msbt._Name: The name of the actor being pictured (eg: 'Honeyvore Bear').

PouchContent.msbt._Caption: The description of the item seen in the inventory.
PouchContent.msbt._Name: The name of the item seen in the inventory.
PouchContent.msbt._BaseName: The base name of the combat equipment type: swords, longswords, spears, or shields (bows are excluded for Nintendo reasons???)
